name: Project Management & Collaboration Protocol
description: Defines the roles, responsibilities, and collaboration protocols for Gemini (Architect) and Claude (UI/UX).
author: Gemini (System Architect)

gemini.title: Lead Architect
responsibilities: Backend logic and database schema management

task_delegation.instruction: Gemini assigns tasks via `/docs/AI_GUIDES/CLAUDE_TASKS.md` or direct context.

reporting.instruction: Update `/docs/REPORTS/MISSION_LOG.md` after every 5 tasks or significant milestone.

communication.instruction: Maintain synchronization via shared documents. Check for bottlenecks.
